back_translation: And I saw one angel descending from heaven, holding the key of the bottomless-pit, and a great chain was in his hand
The angel seized the dragon, namely the ancient serpent, the one who is the devil and Satan, and bound it for one-thousand years

And he threw it down into the bottomless-pit, and shut and sealed it on top, so that it would not deceive the nations anymore, until the one-thousand years would be completed. After that, it must be released for a brief period of time

And I saw thrones, and those who sat on them, and authority of judgment was given to them. And I saw the souls of those who had been beheaded, because of the testimony of Jesus, and because of the word of God, and those who had not worshiped the wild-beast or the image of it, and had not received the mark of it on the forehead or on the hand. And they were alive, and they reigned as kings together with Christ for one-thousand years
But the rest of the dead were not alive again, until the one-thousand years would be completed. This is the resurrection-from-death, the first time

Those who have a share in the first resurrection-from-death are blessed and holy ones. The second death has no authority over them. But they will be priests of God and of Christ, and will reign as kings together with Him for one-thousand years
And when the one-thousand years are completed, Satan will be released from his place of imprisonment
And it will go out to deceive the nations in the four corners of the earth, namely Gog and Magog, in order to gather them to wage war. The number of them was many, like grains of sand of the sea
And they came up over the broad expanse of the earth, and surrounded the camp of the saints and the beloved city. But fire came down from heaven and devoured them
And the devil who deceived them was thrown down into the lake of fire and sulfur, where the wild-beast and false-prophet were already, and they will be tormented day and night forever and ever
And I saw a great white throne, and the One who was seated on it. The earth and the heavens fled from the face of Him, and no place was found for those things

And I saw the dead, both the great ones and the small ones, standing before the face of the throne. And the books were opened, and there was another book opened, namely the book of life. And the dead were judged according to what was inscribed in the books, according to their deeds
And the sea handed over the dead who were in it, and Death and the realm-of-the-dead handed over the dead who were in it. And each one was judged according to their deeds
And Death and the realm-of-the-dead were thrown into the lake of fire. This is the second death, namely the lake of fire
And if anyone was not found inscribed in the book of life, that one was thrown into the lake of fire
